channel.title: Littoralicious
channel.description: Modern science and regional recipes from the sea. For yacht chefs and serious culinary practitioners.

item.title: The Silver Lining Protocol: A Science-Backed Survival Guide for Galley Sanity
item.description: Mental health, resilience, and crew welfare. Psychology research applied to life at sea.

item.title: The Pharmacy in Your Spice Rack: What Science Actually Knows About Medicinal Plants in Food
item.description: Phytochemistry, bioavailability, and what peer-reviewed research actually says about cooking with medicinal plants.
